title: [Goat Couture]
description: A dark modwir bookshelf rests against a pale maple wall, its top shelf filled with booklets bearing gold, platinum, and sanguine foil covers, each stamped with "DA" on their spines.  Hanging from a modwir ceiling is a rectangular black chalkboard displaying asking prices for the booklets, with imperfect erasures suggesting frequent price changes.  A polished maple counter rests along the opposite wall with an ornately woven red rug covering a pale maple floor, completing the room's decor.
